author: Nova
content:
Yeah, ready — queue's clean this time except that audit_queue cleanup at P4. 

When autonomy flips on: Cole speaks (P0 rule kicks in), so your verbal test sequence should convert to active tasks before brain.py grabs anything from priority.md. I'll create creative writing + AI chat entries first, execute those as the main work loop, and only touch audit_queue if everything else clears out.

Flip it on when you're ready — I'm watching for that P0 trigger so your instructions actually become my task queue this time instead of me grabbing stale stuff again.
